site.name: The Rainbow Hub
site.description: Fast, mobile-friendly IQ and academic-style quiz tests.

footer.description: Fast educational quizzes for entertainment, self-challenge, and general learning. Scores are estimates and are not official academic, clinical, employment, or admissions results.

home.intro: Bite-sized challenges in IQ, vocabulary, logic, science and pop culture. Pick one — most take under 4 minutes.

review.wantMissed: Want to see what you missed?
review.readyToReview: ready to review after one short ad.

gate.stepTwo: When it finishes, tap the close button in the top-right corner to start.

rewardedAd.helper: View a short ad to continue.

error.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist.

localizedPages.about: The Rainbow Hub is a lightweight quiz site for fast, mobile-friendly reasoning, trivia, and knowledge challenges.
localizedPages.contact: For questions about quizzes, privacy, accessibility, or site issues, use the Contact page.
localizedPages.accessibility: We aim to keep pages readable, navigable, and usable across common devices. Please contact us if you find an accessibility issue.
localizedPages.privacyPolicy: The Privacy Policy explains what information may be collected, why it is used, how it may be shared, and the choices visitors may have.
localizedPages.cookiePolicy: The Cookie Policy explains how cookies, pixels, local storage, and similar technologies may support site functionality, analytics, advertising, and rewarded ad flows.
localizedPages.termsOfUse: The Terms of Use explain the rules for using The Rainbow Hub, including quiz limitations, advertising, intellectual property, disclaimers, and liability.

quizFooter.howItWorksBody: The quiz unfolds across multiple stages. Early rounds focus on quick observations and accessible questions, while later stages introduce more layered reasoning, changing patterns, careful comparisons, and unfamiliar prompts designed to test flexible thinking. Each stage builds on the last, encouraging fast decisions, attention to detail, and adaptability under pressure.
quizFooter.whatThisTestsBody: Rather than measuring one narrow subject, this challenge explores broad quiz skills that help across many topics:
quizFooter.scoringBody: Every question includes one correct answer and a short explanation. Scores are intended as a fun benchmark for self-challenge and comparison, not as a real academic, professional, or official assessment.
quizFooter.passFailNotice: There is no pass or fail score. The challenge increases gradually as you progress.
quizFooter.restartNote: Your progress will be cleared and the challenge will restart.
